children.name: ParseCommand
children.purpose: Extract and validate the command type from the input JSON
children.behavior: Parse the input JSON to extract the 'command' field and validate it is one of 'place', 'cancel', 'track'

semantic_outputs.name: order_data
semantic_outputs.description: Remaining JSON data after command extraction

guarantees: Returns error if command is missing or invalid

outputs.name: result
outputs.description: Dictionary with 'command' and 'order_data' keys, or error

children.name: PlaceOrder
children.behavior: Reserve inventory, process payment, create order record, return success with order_id

semantic_inputs.name: order_data
semantic_inputs.description: Order details including items and customer info

semantic_outputs.name: result
semantic_outputs.description: JSON with success, order_id, status, message

children.stop_reason: Can be further decomposed into sub-steps

call_inputs.name: order_data
call_inputs.description: Order details including items and customer info

outputs.name: result
outputs.description: Dictionary with success, order_id, status, message

children.name: CancelOrder
children.behavior: Check order status, if not shipped, cancel order, refund payment, restore inventory

semantic_outputs.name: result
semantic_outputs.description: JSON with success, order_id, status, message

children.stop_reason: Can be further decomposed into sub-steps

internal_leaf_accesses.reason: Check order status and update to cancelled

outputs.name: result
outputs.description: Dictionary with success, order_id, status, message

children.name: TrackOrder
children.purpose: Retrieve and return order tracking information
children.behavior: Look up order by ID in orders store and return current status and tracking details

semantic_outputs.name: result
semantic_outputs.description: JSON with success, order_id, status, message, tracking_info

internal_leaf_accesses.reason: Retrieve order status and tracking details

outputs.name: result
outputs.description: Dictionary with success, order_id, status, message, tracking_info

dataflow_edges.note: Parent passes raw JSON input to ParseCommand
ParseCommand returns parsed command and order_data to parent
Parent routes order_data to PlaceOrder when command is 'place'
Parent routes order_data to CancelOrder when command is 'cancel'
Parent routes order_data to TrackOrder when command is 'track'

interface_audit.identity_preservation_detail: All four child names (ParseCommand, PlaceOrder, CancelOrder, TrackOrder) are preserved exactly as in Stage 1, in the same order.
interface_audit.semantic_preservation_detail: All Stage 1 fields (purpose, behavior, boundary, semantic_inputs, semantic_outputs, preconditions, postconditions, guarantees, composition_role) are copied verbatim without modification.
interface_audit.call_signature_detail: Each child's signature contains only the call_inputs parameters. ParseCommand takes 'input' from parent. PlaceOrder, CancelOrder, TrackOrder each take 'order_data' from parent. No internal resources appear in signatures.
interface_audit.internal_leaf_separation_detail: Data stores (inventory, payments, orders) are listed only in internal_leaf_accesses, not in call_inputs. This ensures the parent does not need to pass store references, maintaining encapsulation.
interface_audit.dataflow_schema_detail: All from_node and to_node values are either 'parent' or exact child names (ParseCommand, PlaceOrder, CancelOrder, TrackOrder). No resource names like 'orders' or 'inventory' appear as endpoints.
